hero.title: Discover the Egadi Islands by Sea
hero.subtitle: Unique boat experiences between Favignana, Levanzo and Marettimo. Accessible luxury, adventure and Mediterranean flavours.

socialBoating.title: Social Boating
socialBoating.short: Sailing, swimming and fresh fish lunch. The most convivial way to discover the Egadi.

exclusive.title: Exclusive Experience
exclusive.short: Renowned chef, customized route, uncompromised luxury.

cabinCharter.title: Cabin Charter
cabinCharter.short: A week among the Egadi Islands. Your home is the sea.

boatShared.title: Shared Boat Tour
boatShared.short: Boat tour to the Egadi, ideal for small groups.

boatExclusive.title: Exclusive Boat Tour
boatExclusive.short: The boat all for you and your group.
